name: Therapy - Physical (GP) / Occupational (GO)
description: Review for duplicate therapy visits on the same day with same modifiers (GP, GO).

overpayment_conditions.same_day_same_modifier: Multiple visits on the same day with the same therapy modifier (GP for Physical, GO for Occupational) from the same provider.
overpayment_conditions.attribute_match: Modifier, provider, charges, and units match exactly on same-day visits.

explanation_templates.valid: Separate therapy sessions with justification for same-day service.
explanation_templates.duplicate: Duplicate charges for same therapy type on the same date of service with matching attributes.
